column1: # Headless plugin behavior-test cases — TAB-separated, one case per line.
# Columns: id  plugin_dir  fixture_dir  prompt  artifact  regex
#   id          short unique name (also the run.sh filter arg)
#   plugin_dir  repo-relative plugin dir passed to `claude --plugin-dir`
#   fixture_dir repo-relative dir copied into a temp cwd as the "target repo"
#   prompt      the `claude --print` prompt (should trigger exactly one skill)
#   artifact    repo-relative-to-cwd file the skill must produce, or - for none
#               (when -, the regex is matched against claude's stdout instead)
#   regex       egrep -i pattern proving the seeded defect was caught
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored. Keep the columns tab-separated.

column4: Audit the UI accessibility of this repo with self-assess-ui-audit.
Map the real import-graph stages and wires of this repo with self-assess-stage-map.
Audit this repo's dependencies for hallucinated packages with confab-dependency-audit.
